This article needs to be cleaned up to conform to a higher standard of quality.
Notes: Separate spin-off lines into their own articles

High Grade Universal Century

Merchandise Type

  • Model Kit
  • Gunpla

Manufacturer

  • Bandai

Grade

  • High Grade

Scale

  • 1/144

Era

  • Universal Century
  • Future Century
  • After Colony
  • After War
  • Correct Century
  • Cosmic Era
  • Kōreki

High Grade Universal Century (HGUC) (ハイグレード ユニバーサルセンチュリー, Hai Gurēdo Yunibāsaru Senchurī?) is a line of 1/144 scale Gunpla model kits of the Mobile Suits from the Universal Century timeline of the Gundam meta series. First produced in 1999, the line is a successor to the original High Grade line. The line inherited many of the improvements of its predecessor, such as snap-fit assembly, while further improving the detail, color separation, and articulation of kits.

In 2009, the HGUC line incorporated the sub-line High Grade U.C. Hard Graph, which featured kits with 1/144 scale military vehicles and soldiers in addition to Mobile Suits.

Starting in 2010, the line also extended to the After Colony, After War, Future Century, Cosmic Era and Correct Century timelines with the HGAC, HGAW, HGFC, HGCE, and HGCC lines, respectively, as part of what was later dubbed the "HG All Gundam Project".[1] The alternate timeline kits are distinguished by a silver stripe on the front of the box, as opposed to the gold stripe featured on HGUC kits, as well as a corresponding variation of the HG logo.

In 2015, Bandai announced the "Revive" project to celebrate the 35th anniversary of Gunpla.[2] Starting with the RX-77-2 Guncannon, previous HGUC releases are given a complete redesign using newer technology with further improved detail and articulation, alongside modernized proportions.

To prepare for the 40th anniversary of Gunpla in 2020, the "Gunpla Evolution Project" began in 2017.[3] Showcasing improvements/innovations in specific areas, this project involved Gunpla from multiple lines, with the first kit released being a redesign of the MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam.

Following the reorganization of Bandai Namco Group, box covers of reissue and future release of kits from September 2018 onwards feature a blue Bandai logo instead of the original red logo, while releases and reissues from mid-2022 onwards further feature the Bandai Namco logo on the upper right corner.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
001 RX-77-2 'Guncannon' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 1999 May First release in the HGUC line. Includes Spray Missiles.
002 YMS-15 'Gyan' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 1999 July First 1/144 scale kit to use a detachable clear colored beam effect part for its beam saber.
003 AMX-011S 'Zaku-III Custom' Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,500 1999 August
004 AMX-004 'Qubeley' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 1999 September
005 MSN-00100 'Hyaku-Shiki' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 1999 October First kit to use chrome plated parts. Plate runners use "undergating" arrangement, visually reducing the amount of nub marks during assembly. Includes dry transfer sheet with two "百" markings.
006 MSM-07 'ZʼGok' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥700 1999 November

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
007 RX-75 'Guntank' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2000 January First kit to not include decal sheet.
008 MSM-03 'Gogg' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2000 March
009 MS-07B 'Gouf' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2000 April
010 RMS-099 'Rick Dias' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,200 2000 June
011 AMX-004-2 'Qubeley Mk-II' Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,500 2000 June Color variant of HGUC-004.
012 RMS-106 'Hi-Zack' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,000 2000 July Compatible with the "Weapons for Mobile Suit" kit of the 1985 Zeta Gundam Gunpla series. Later reissues have the pelvis part B7 molded with a rectangular hole to accommodate an Action Base 2.
013 RX-78GP01 'Gundam GP01' Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,200 2000 August First Gundam released in the HGUC line. Includes non-transformable FF-XII Core Fighter II and 90mm Machine Gun as seen in episodes 2 and 3 of the OVA.
014 AMX-011 'Zaku-III' Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,500 2000 September Parts and color variant of HGUC-003.
015 AMX-107 'Bawoo' Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,200 2000 September First transformable/separable HGUC kit.
016 MS-14F 'Gelgoog Marine' Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,200 2000 October
017 MS-09F 'Dom Tropen' Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,500 2000 November
018 RX-78GP01Fb 'Gundam GP01Fb' Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,500 2000 December Parts variant of HGUC-013. Includes non-transformable FF-XII-Fb Core Fighter II Full Burnern.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
019 MSM-07S 'ZʼGok Commander Type' (Char Aznable Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥700 2001 February Color variant of HGUC-006.
020 RGM-79 'GM' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥700 2001 April
021 RX-78-2 'Gundam' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2001 May Redesign of HG-01 with improved articulation and proportions. Includes non-transformable FF-X7 Core Fighter. First kit to use clear colored beam saber effect parts; this would not be standard on HGUC Gundams until 2005.
022 MSN-02 'Zeong' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,800 2001 June First kit to include a display base. Fingers are compatible with MG beam saber effect parts. Reissues from 2023 onwards are molded in Ecopla, which is plastic recycled from materials discarded during the production of regular Gunpla.
023 MSA-0011 'S Gundam' Gundam Sentinel ¥1,800 2001 August Not transformable unlike its MG counterpart. Includes non-transformable FXA-08GB G-Core. G-Attacker unit sold separately as EX-05.
024 RMS-141 'Xekueins' Gundam Sentinel ¥1,600 2001 October
025 RX-78GP03S 'Gundam GP03S' Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,600 2001 December Features deployable folding arms. Includes non-transformable FF-XII-Sp Core Fighter II-Sp.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
026 MS-14Fs 'Gelgoog Marine' (Cima Garahau Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,500 2002 January Parts and color variant of HGUC-016.
027 MS-09F 'Dom Tropen' (Sand Brown) Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,600 2002 February Parts and color variant of HGUC-017. Includes open left hand, rear skirt thruster, and additional weapons and ammo.
028 RX-78GP03 Gundam GP03 Dendrobium Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥28,000 2002 March Enhanced version of HGUC-025. Uses diecast metal frame parts. The longest (1m × 0.5m × 0.6m) and most expensive non-bundled HGUC kit to date.
029 MSA-0011[Ext] 'Ex-S Gundam' Gundam Sentinel ¥2,500 2002 April Parts variant of HGUC-023. Not transformable unlike its MG counterpart.
030 RX-178 'Gundam Mk-II' (Titans) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,000 2002 May First kit to have a right hand and beam saber molded as a single piece. Includes marking sheet for units 01-03. Later reissues include the modified foot parts introduced in HGUC-050.
031 AMX-107 'Bawoo' (Mass Production) Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,200 2002 June Color variant of HGUC-015. Fully transformable kit.
032 MS-06S 'Zaku II' (Char Aznable Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2002 July First 1/144 scale Zaku II kit to feature a movable monoeye (removal of helmet is required to adjust monoeye).
033 RMS-099 'Rick Dias' (Quattro Bajeena Custom) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,200 2002 August Color variant of HGUC-010.
034 MS-06Fs 'Zaku II FS' (Garma Zabi Custom) Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,000 2002 September Color variant of HGUC-032. Includes Magella Top Cannon, larger Heat Hawk, and a different head part with vulcan guns. First kit from 'MSV'.
035 FXA-05D/RX-178 'Super Gundam' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,000 2002 November Color variant of HGUC-030 with fully transformable FXA-05D G-Defenser; redesign of HG-03 with improved articulation and proportions. First kit to introduce Mobile Armors in size proportional to the Mobile Suits. Later reissues include the modified foot parts introduced in HGUC-050.
036 PMX-003 'The-O' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,400 2002 December

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
037 MSM-03C 'Hy-Gogg' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,200 2003 June
038 RGM-79D 'GM Cold Districts Type' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥800 2003 July Last HGUC kit to have a non-functional beam saber handle.
039 MSM-07E 'ZʼGok Experiment' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,200 2003 August
040 MS-06F 'Zaku II' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2003 September Color variant of HGUC-032. Includes two leg-mounted missile pods.
041 MSZ-006 'Zeta Gundam' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,600 2003 October Redesign of HG-02 with improved articulation and proportions. Includes grenade launchers and Hyper Mega Launcher with landing gear. First kit to transform via parts-swapping; also the last HGUC kit to have a right hand and beam saber molded as a single piece.
042 ORX-005 'Gaplant' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,200 2003 November Fully transformable kit. Includes booster unit and display base.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
043 MS-09R2 'Rick Dom II' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,500 2004 January
044 RX-77D 'Guncannon Mass Production Type' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,000 2004 February
045 MS-14JG 'Gelgoog Jäger' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,200 2004 April Released to coincide with the 15th anniversary of Mobile Suit Gundam 0080.
046 RGM-79G 'GM Command' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥800 2004 May Uses a modified version of the A plate runner of HGUC-038.
047 RX-78NT-1 'Gundam NT1' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,500 2004 May Includes removable Chobham Armor parts. The last HGUC Gundam kit to have a single-piece beam saber.
048 Hyaku-Shiki + 'Mega Bazooka Launcher' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2004 July Enhanced version of HGUC-005; molded in golden yellow instead of gold chrome plated. Mega Bazooka Launcher is fully transformable with minor parts swapping. Includes custom display base. Compatible with linkage part of HGUC-061.
049 MRX-009 'Psycho Gundam' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥5,000 2004 August Fully transformable kit. First stand-alone HGUC mobile armor kit.
050 G-Armor 'G-Fighter + RX-78-2 Gundam' Mobile Suit Gundam ¥2,800 2004 October Enhanced verson of HGUC-021. Feet are modified to allow docking with the G-Fighter; backpack is also modified to hold the beam sabers more firmly. Includes display base.
051 RGM-79G 'GM Command Space' Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥800 2004 October Parts and color variant of HGUC-046.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
052 RMS-108 'Marasai' Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,400 2005 January First kit to include a peg in the right weapon hand for extra security.
053 RX-178 Gundam Mk-II + Flying Armor Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,000 2005 January Re-release of HGUC-035 with Flying Armor instead of G-Defenser. Feet use modification introduced in HGUC-50. Includes display base for Flying Armor and mesh pipes for the beam saber holder joints on the backpack. First kit to include a preview of all the previously released kits from that anime series in the instruction manual.
054 NRX-044 Asshimar Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,000 2005 June Fully transformable kit. Includes "swivel" display base with storage compartment for extra parts and adapter for Mobile Armor mode.
055 RMS-106 Hi-Zack (Earth Federation Force) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,000 2005 June Color variant of HGUC-012. Includes marking sheet with EFF and Titans symbols. Later reissues have the pelvis part B7 molded with a rectangular hole to accommodate an Action Base 2.
056 RX-121-1 Gundam TR-1 [Hazel Custom]​ Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥1,300 2005 September First HG kit to use double-jointed elbow parts previously used in Master Grade kits, which would later on become the standard in HG kits. First release included Advance of Zeta Guide Book. D plate runner molded in KPS instead of ABS in later reissues.
057 RX-121-2A Gundam TR-1 [Advanced Hazel]​ Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥1,600 2005 November Parts and color variant of HGUC-056. D plate runner molded in KPS instead of ABS in later reissues.
058 RX-110 Gabthley Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,600 2005 December Fully transformable kit with three modes, including a "Middle Form". Includes "swivel" display base with storage compartment for extra parts and adapter for Mobile Armor mode.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
059 MS-09 Dom/MS-09R Rick-Dom Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,700 2006 January Either of the two units can be built at any time. First kit to provide parts for the creation of multiple variants. First 1/144 Dom to use a clear visor and adjustable monoeye.
060 PMX-001 Palace Athene Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2006 February
061 MSA-005 Methuss Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,400 2006 March Fully transformable kit. Includes adaptor part for HGUC-048.
062 AMX-003 Gaza C (Haman Karn Custom) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam -A New Translation- ¥1,400 2006 April Fully transformable kit. Colors are not anime-accurate, as parts are molded in pinkish white and maroon instead of the proper lavender and purple.
063 AMX-003 Gaza C Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,400 2006 April Color variant of HGUC-062. Fully transformable kit. Includes BA-1 display base.
064 MS-05B Zaku I Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2006 May
065 EMS-10 Zudah Mobile Suit Gundam MS IGLOO ¥1,400 2006 June Features extendable arms. Includes parts to create three different head configurations (two standard type and one commander type).
066 RX-78GP02A Gundam GP02A Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥2,000 2006 July Uses almost no polycaps on the vital joints (only on the waist, hips, ankles, and accessories). Includes BA-1 display base and adapter for use with HGUC-013 or HGUC-018 to re-enact fight scenes from the OVA. Released to commemorate the 15th anniversary of Mobile Suit Gundam 0083.
067 RGM-79 Powered GM Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,200 2006 August
068 MS-05B Zaku I (Black Tri-Stars Type) Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,000 2006 August Color variant of HGUC-064.
069 RX-121-2 Gundam TR-1 [Hazel II]​ Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥1,500 2006 September Parts variant of HGUC-057.
070 MS-14S Gelgoog (Char Aznable Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,500 2006 October First kit to incorporate a separate pelvis joint that allows forward and backward hip movement. This feature would later on be used in the HGUC and other HG lines.
071 MS-05L Zaku I Sniper Type Harmony of Gundam[4] ¥1,400 2006 November Parts and color variant of HGUC-064.
072 RGM-79FP GM Striker Harmony of Gundam ¥1,200 2006 December Uses the D plate runner of HGUC-067.
073 ORX-005 Gaplant TR-5 [Hrairoo]​ Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥2,400 2006 December Parts and color variant of HGUC-042. Fully transformable kit with minor parts-swapping. Includes display base and Shielder Unit attachment part to combine the Long Blade Rifle with HGUC-056/HGUC-057's Shield Boosters or HGUC-069's shield.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
074 RGM-79Q GM Quel Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory / Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥1,200 2007 January Parts variant of HGUC-069. First kit to include optionally separate front skirt armor, which would become the standard for later kits.
075 RX-78GP02A Gundam GP02A (Type-MLRS) Harmony of Gundam ¥2,200 2007 February Parts and color variant of HGUC-066. Includes parts to create RX-78GP02A Gundam GP02A (Beam Bazooka Type).
076 MS-14A Gelgoog / MS-14C Gelgoog Cannon Mobile Suit Gundam / Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,500 2007 March Color variant of HGUC-070; either of the two units can be built at any time. Also includes head parts for both standard and commander variants.
077 RX-79BD-2 Blue Destiny Unit 2 Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,500 2007 April First HGUC Gundam kit to use the pelvis swing joint first introduced in HGUC-070.
078 MSM-04 Acguy Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,400 2007 April Includes stub part to replicate missing right arm in episode 9 of Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team.
079 RX-79[G] Gundam Ground Type Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team ¥1,500 2007 June Parts and color variant of HGUC-077; redesign of RX-79[G] Gundam from HG08-01 with improved articulation and proportions.
080 RX-79BD-1 Blue Destiny Unit 1 Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,500 2007 July Parts and color variant of HGUC-077.
081 MSM-10 Zock Mobile Suit Gundam ¥2,500 2007 July Includes adapter for Action Base 1.
082 RX-79BD-3 Blue Destiny Unit 3 Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,500 2007 July Parts and color variant of HGUC-077.
083 MSN-03 Jagd Doga (Gyunei Guss Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥2,200 2007 October Features gunmetal colored joint parts.
084 MSN-03 Jagd Doga (Quess Paraya Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥2,200 2007 October Color variant of HGUC-083 with different head parts; Beam Assault Rifle replaced with Mega Gatling Gun.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
085 RGZ-91 Re-GZ Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥2,800 2008 January Features gunmetal colored joint parts. Includes Back Weapon System.
086 RX-93 ν Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥2,500 2008 March Features gunmetal colored joint parts. Includes additional Fin Funnel holder to create RX-93 ν Gundam Double Fin Funnel Type. Released to coincide with the 20th anniversary of Char's Counterattack.
087 MS-06FZ Zaku II FZ Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,200 2008 May Includes A-type and B-type heads. Hip joints feature a forward swing mechanism to replicate the crash pose in episode 1 of the OVA.
088 MSN-04 Sazabi Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥2,800 2008 June Features gunmetal colored joint parts.
089 MS-18E Kämpfer Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,800 2008 August
090 MS-09RII Rick Dom II (Colony Attack Colors) Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,500 2008 August Color variant of HGUC-043.
091 AMS-119 Geara Doga Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥1,800 2008 November First HG kit to use a switch under the head to rotate the monoeye; this would later on become a standard feature in 1/144 scale Geara Zulu and most Zaku II kits. Features gunmetal colored joint and weapon parts. Includes optional commander type head.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
092 AMS-119 Geara Doga (Rezin Schnyder Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥1,800 2009 January Color variant of HGUC-091. Includes beam sword effect part and different beam machine gun.
093 ν Gundam HWS Char's Counterattack Mobile Suit Variations ¥2,800 2009 April Parts and color variant of HGUC-086.
094 RMS-099B Schuzrum Dias Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,700 2009 April Parts and color variant of HGUC-010. Includes marking sheet with Zeon, A.E.U.G., and EFSF markings.
095 RX-93-ν2 Hi-ν Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack - Beltorchika's Children ¥2,200 2009 June Resembles closer to the 2007 MG redesign than the original lineart. Features gunmetal colored joint and weapon parts. Unlike its MG counterparts, only two of its six Fin Funnels are functional.
096 RMS-119 EWAC Zack Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,600 2009 June Parts and color variant of HGUC-012. Incorporates HGUC-091's monoeye switch gimmick. Later reissues have the pelvis part B7 molded with a rectangular hole to accommodate an Action Base 2.
097 RGM-89 Jegan Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥1,500 2009 August Uses SB5 beam saber runner from HG00-28.
098 FA-78-3 Full Armor Gundam 7th Mobile Suit Gundam: Battlefield Record U.C. 0081 ¥1,500 2009 August First HGUC Gundam kit to use the universal hip joint assembly derived from the High Grade Gundam 00 line instead of the conventional ball joint assembly.
099 NZ-666 Kshatriya Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥4,500 2009 October First kit to use the current format of the MS name on the bottom of the box cover and the series logos on the front and sides of the box.
100 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam (Destroy Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,800 2009 November Includes Beam Magnum.
101 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam (Unicorn Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,500 2009 November Uses the A plate runner of HGUC-100. Includes Hyper Bazooka, beam saber effect parts, and a pair of open hands.
102 AMS-129 Geara Zulu Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,800 2009 December

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
103 RGZ-95 ReZEL Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2010 January Transforms via parts-swapping.
104 RGM-89S Stark Jegan Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2010 February Parts and color variant of HGUC-097.
105 MS-06F-2 Zaku II F2 (Zeon Version) Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,500 2010 February First HG Zaku II kit to incorporate HGUC-091's monoeye switch gimmick. Includes two leg-mounted missile pods and optional commander and Applique Armor type heads.
106 D-50C Loto Twin Set Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2010 March First twin pack release.
107 MS-06F-2 Zaku II F2 (E.F.S.F Version) Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,500 2010 March Color variant of HGUC-105.
108 RGZ-95C ReZEL (Commander Type) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,200 2010 March Parts and color variant of HGUC-103. Transforms via parts-swapping. Released to coincide with episode 1 of the OVA.
109 GX-9900 Gundam X After War Gundam X ¥1,800 2010 April First kit from the After War timeline (HGAW) and the first kit outside the Universal Century.
110 GF13-017NJII G Gundam Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥1,800 2010 May First kit from the Future Century timeline (HGFC). Includes transformable Core Lander and clear orange "God Finger" hands. Reissues from 2025 onwards have the English name changed to "Burning Gundam".
111 MSZ-010 ΖΖ Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,300 2010 June Redesign of HG-04 with improved articulation and proportions. Transforms via parts-swapping. Includes non-transformable FXA-07GB Neo Core Fighter and Action Base adapter for G-Fortress mode that doubles as a spare parts holder.
112 AMS-129 Geara Zulu (Angelo Sauper Use) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,200 2010 July Parts and color variant of HGUC-102.
113 RGM-79C GM Type C Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,200 2010 August Uses the C and D plate runners of HGUC-067. Introduces the HG MP-1 E plate runner, which consists of hand parts for later GM and MSA-003 Nemo kits. Includes adapter for Action Base 1.
114 RB-79 Ball Twin Set Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,300 2010 September Includes two display bases for each Ball.
115 MSN-001A1 Delta Plus Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,200 2010 September Transforms via parts-swapping.
116 MSN-06S Sinanju Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,600 2010 October Released to coincide with episode 2 of the OVA.
117 MS-07B-3 Gouf Custom Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team ¥1,600 2010 November Redesign of HG08-05 with improved articulation and proportions; uses the D1 plate runner of the original kit.
118 GX-9900-DV Gundam X Divider After War Gundam X ¥1,800 2010 December Parts variant of HGAW-109.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
119 GF13-050NSW Nobell Gundam Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥1,500 2011 January Uses no polycaps. Includes Beam Ribbons with bottom weights, a clear white BA-1 display base with adapter, and hands for HGFC-110 to replicate a scene from episode 30 of the series.
120 RGM-79N GM Custom Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,300 2011 January Uses the D plate runner of HGUC-067 and the MP-1 E plate runner of HGUC-113.
121 Extreme Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam: Extreme Vs. ¥1,600 2011 February First Gundam not to be part of any official timeline. Also the first HG kit to feature non-functional beam saber handles since HGUC-038.
122 AMS-129 Geara Zulu (Guards Type) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2011 March Parts and color variant of HGUC-112. Released to coincide with episode 3 of the OVA.
123 RGM-89De Jegan (ECOAS Type) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2011 April Parts and color variant of HGUC-097. First kit to use runner as storage for unused hand parts.
124 AMX-009 Dreissen (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2011 May Uses runner as storage for unused hand parts. Compatible with effect parts from HGUC-083.
125 RGC-83 GM Cannon II Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,400 2011 June Uses the B plate runner of HGUC-120, the D plate runner of HGUC-067, and the MP-1 E plate runner of HGUC-113. Uses piece of C plate runner as storage for unused hand parts.
126 RGM-86R GM III Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,500 2011 July Based on Hajime Katoki's redesign for Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn. Includes marking sheet with E.F.S.F., A.E.U.G., and Londo Bell markings.
127 GF13-017NJ Shining Gundam Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥1,500 2011 August Includes transformable Core Lander, "Super Mode" head, and clear green "Shining Finger" hands, "Giant Hand" and "Shining Finger Sword" effect parts.
128 GF13-001NHII Master Gundam & Fuunsaiki Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥2,400 2011 August Includes clear red "Master Cloth", "Darkness Finger" hands, and "Giant Hand" effect parts and display base for Fuunsaiki, plus a clear pink Master Asia figurine. Transforms into Normal Mode via parts-swapping.
129 GF13-050NSW Nobell Gundam Berserker Mode Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥1,500 2011 September Red gloss-injected variant of HGFC-119 with new "hair" part and beam sword effect parts (instead of Beam Ribbons).
130 RGM-96X Jesta Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2011 September Uses runner as storage for unused hand parts.
131 RMS-179 GM II Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,400 2011 October Uses a color variant of the A and B plate runners of HGUC-126. Includes marking sheet with E.F.S.F., Titans, and A.E.U.G. markings.
132 AMS-129M Zee Zulu Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,400 2011 November Parts and color variant of HGUC-102. Released to coincide with episode 4 of the OVA.
133 MS-21C Dra-C Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥2,000 2011 November Includes beam gatling gun from Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn and a clear display base.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
134 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 02 Banshee (Destroy Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,800 2012 January Color variant of HGUC-100 with additional F and G plate runners.
135 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 02 Banshee (Unicorn Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2012 January Color variant of HGUC-101 with additional F and G plate runners.
136 MSN-001 Delta Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn MSV ¥4,200 2012 March Parts and gold chrome plated variant of HGUC-115. First chrome plated release since HGUC-005. Transforms via parts-swapping. First kit from Unicorn MSV.
137 MS-05L Zaku I Sniper Type (Yonem Kirks Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2012 March Color variant of HGUC-071 with new head, left shoulder armor, and backpack parts. Some parts require cementing.
138 RMS-108 Marasai (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2012 March Color variant of HGUC-052. Includes Fedayeen Rifle and Sea Serpent.
139 MSM-04G Juaggu (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,700 2012 March
140 MSA-003 Nemo (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,500 2012 April Uses the MP-1 E plate runner of HGUC-113. Includes GM Custom Rifle.
141 RAS-96 Anksha Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,600 2012 May Released to coincide with episode 5 of the OVA. Transforms via minor parts-swapping. Includes BA-1 display base with MA mode adapter plus handles and support peg to accommodate most 1/144 scale MS kits in MA mode.
142 RGZ-95C ReZEL Type C [Defenser B-Unit] [GR] Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,200 2012 June Parts and color variant of HGUC-103. Transforms via parts-swapping.
143 RMS-192M Zaku Mariner Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,400 2012 July Molded in Gundam Unicorn colors, despite being marketed as a Gundam ZZ kit. Includes two different antennas, two different chest parts, and two different pairs of front leg parts.
144 Base Jabber (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,000 2012 July Support unit for HGUC-130 and most 1/144 scale kits. Holds up to two MS kits with the removal of the propellant tanks.
145 RX-139 Hambrabi Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,700 2012 August Fully transformable kit. Uses the F plate runner of HGUC-138.
146 RGM-79SP GM Sniper II Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥1,500 2012 September Includes an RH-35E Riah 35 Draken-E with two different arm configurations.
147 RX-160S Byarlant Custom Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,600 2012 November Includes adapter for Action Base 1 and marking sheet with labels for HGUC-140.
148 MSN-001X Gundam Delta Kai Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn MSV ¥2,600 2012 December Parts and color variant of HGUC-115. Transforms via parts-swapping.
149 YAMS-132 Rozen Zulu Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,800 2012 December Includes clear display stands for relay INCOM hands and Psycho Jammers.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
150 MSA-003 Nemo Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 2013 January Color variant of HGUC-140 with Beam Rifle instead of GM Rifle. Last HGUC kit to have pictures of actual model kit in the background of the boxart.
151 MS-06R-1A Zaku II (Black Tri-Stars Custom) Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,600 2013 February
152 RGM-96X Jesta Cannon Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2013 February Parts variant of HGUC-130.
153 RX-0[N] Unicorn Gundam 02 Banshee Norn (Unicorn Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,700 2013 March Parts variant of HGUC-135. Includes articulated Armed Armor VN for HGUC-134. Released to coincide with episode 6 of the OVA. Hyper Beam Javelin available with Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn - Bande Dessinee Vol. 14.
154 MS-06R-1A Zaku II (Shin Matsunaga Custom) Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,600 2013 March Parts and color variant of HGUC-151.
155 RX-79(G)Ez-8 Gundam Ez8 Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team ¥1,600 2013 April Redesign of HG08-03 with improved articulation and proportions. Includes parachute pack. Compatible with the Weapon Rack of HGUC-079.
156 RX-0 Full Armor Unicorn Gundam (Unicorn Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥3,000 2013 May Re-release of HGUC-101 with Full Armor parts. Includes stands for rocket boosters.
157 PMX-000 Messala Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥3,000 2013 June Fully transformable kit with some parts-swapping. Includes light grey Action Base 2 with custom platform.
158 Type89 Base Jabber Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,200 2013 June Includes adapters to mount two 1/144 scale mobile suits and different mounting points for Action Base.
159 AGX-04 Gerbera Tetra Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥1,800 2013 July Includes optional Stürm Booster.
160 AMX-014 Döven Wolf (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn MSV ¥2,200 2013 August Includes swappable hidden arms, wires and support stands for the Beam Hands.
161 MSM-08 Zogok (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,700 2013 September
162 XXXG-01W Wing Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2013 September Part of the HG All Gundam Project. First kit from the After Colony timeline (HGAC). Fully transformable kit.
163 GX-9901-DX Gundam Double X After War Gundam X ¥1,700 2013 October
164 MSA-003 Nemo (Unicorn Desert Color Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,500 2013 November Color variant of HGUC-140. Includes extra marking sheet and both rifles of HGUC-140 and HGUC-150.
165 LM312V04 Victory Gundam Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥1,200 2013 November First kit from the Late Universal Century timeline. Not transformable unlike its 1/100 scale HG or MG counterparts. Includes non-transformable Core Fighter.
166 MS-06R-2 Johnny Ridden's Zaku II Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,800 2013 November Parts and color variant of HGUC-151.
167 F91 Gundam F91 Mobile Suit Gundam F91 ¥1,200 2013 December Includes extra face plate and shoulder fins to replicate the M.E.P.E. Mode.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
168 Harrison Madin's Gundam F91 Mobile Suit Crossbone Gundam ¥1,200 2014 January Color variant of HGUC-167. Includes duplicate C plate runners for color accuracy.
169 LM314V21 Victory Two Gundam Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥1,300 2014 January Not transformable unlike its 1/100 scale HG/MG or 1/60 HG-EX counterparts. Includes non-transformable Core Fighter.
170 ARX-014 Silver Bullet Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn - Bande Dessinee ¥2,200 2014 February Parts and color variant of HGUC-160. Includes Gundam and GM-type faces.
171 GAT-X105+AQM/E-X01 Aile Strike Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ¥1,400 2014 February Parts variant of HGBF-001; redesign of HGSEED-01 with better articulation and improved proportions. First kit from the Cosmic Era timeline (HGCE). Compatible with Striker Packs from the HGSEED, No-Grade 1/144, OPS-01, OPS-02 and OPS-14.
172 AMX-009 Dreissen Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,100 February 2014 Color variant of HGUC-124; chest and arm parts remolded without the "Sleeves" grooves.
173 AMX-014 Döven Wolf Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,400 February 2014 Color variant of HGUC-160.
174 XXXG-00W0 Wing Gundam Zero Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,700 2014 March Fully transformable kit with some parts-swapping.
175 RX-0[N] Unicorn Gundam 02 Banshee Norn (Destroy Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,450 2014 March Parts variant of HGUC-134; psychoframe molded in clear orange instead of gold. Uses the F plate runner of HGUC RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Destroy Mode) Ver.GFT.
176 MBF-02+AQM/E-X01 Strike Rouge Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ¥1,500 2014 March Color variant of HGCE-171. Compatible with the IWSP Striker Pack of HGSEED-MSV01, other Striker Packs from the HGSEED kits, OPS-01 and OPS-15.
177 WD-M01 ∀ Gundam ∀ Gundam ¥1,500 2014 April First kit from the Correct Century timeline (HGCC). Includes non-transformable Core Fighter.
178 RX-0 Full Armor Unicorn Gundam (Destroy Mode) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥3,200 2014 April Parts and color variant of HGUC-100 and HGUC-156. Includes stands for the shields and rocket boosters. Hyper Beam Javelin sold separately with Gundam UC Ace Vol. 6.
179 NZ-666 Kshatriya Repaired Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥6,500 2014 May Parts variant of HGUC-099. Released to coincide with episode 7 of the OVA.
180 AMX-102 Zssa (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,400 2014 June
181 NZ-999 Neo Zeong Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥27,000 2014 June Enhanced version of HGUC-116. Includes Rocket Bazooka, custom display base, and storage box. At a height of 86 cm, it is the tallest HG kits to date.
182 MSZ-006A1 Zeta plus (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,400 2014 July Transforms via parts-swapping. Includes optional marking sheet. First release had mold issues reported on B4 (head) and B31 (front waist armor) parts and incorrect artwork on the box cover. Later releases had these issues corrected.[5]
183 AMX-101E Schuzrum-Galluss Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,400 2014 July Spike Shields transform via parts-swapping.
184 GW-9800 Gundam Airmaster After War Gundam X ¥1,700 2014 July Transforms via head removal. First release had mold issue on E5 part; later releases had this issue corrected.[6]
185 YAMS-132 Rozen Zulu (Episode 7 Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,700 2014 August Color variant of HGUC-149 with additional parts.
186 MSZ-008 ZII Zeta Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥2,400 2014 September Transforms via parts-swapping. Includes Action Base 1 & 2 adapter for Wave Rider mode.
187 XM-X1 Crossbone Gundam X-1 Mobile Suit Crossbone Gundam ¥1,800 2014 November Parts and color variant of HGBF-014. Includes non-transformable Core Fighter.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
188 LM312V04+SD-VB03A V-Dash Gundam Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥1,800 2015 March Re-release of HGUC-165 with SD-VB03A Overhang pack. Includes non-transformable Core Booster and optional head to create the LM312V06 Victory Gundam Hexa.
189 LM314V23/24 Victory Two Assault-Buster Gundam Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥2,000 2015 May Re-release of of HGUC-169 with Assault and Buster packs. Beam effect parts not included.
190 RX-77-2 Guncannon (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,200 2015 June First release under the "Revive" project. Redesign of HGUC-001 with better articulation and improved proportions. Includes marking sheet for Units 108 (Kai Shiden), 109 (Hayato Kobayashi), and 203 (from Mobile Suit Gundam Battlefield Record: Avant-Title).
191 RX-78-2 Gundam (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2015 July Redesign of HGUC-021 with better articulation and improved proportions. Released to coincide with the 35th anniversary of Gunpla. Beam Javelin and Gundam Hammer sets were sold separately with Gundam ACE.
192 ZGMF-X10A Freedom Gundam (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ¥1,700 2015 August Redesign of HGSEED-07 with better articulation and improved proportions. A custom kit with a new head sculpt and additional weapons is sold exclusively with the October 2015 issue of Hobby Japan.
193 RX-178 Gundam Mk-II (A.E.U.G.) (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 2015 November Redesign of HGUC-035/HGUC-053 with better articulation and improved proportions. Released to coincide with the 30th anniversary of Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam.
194 RX-178 Gundam Mk-II (Titans) (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 2015 November Color variant of HGUC-193; redesign of HGUC-030 with better articulation and improved proportions. Includes marking sheet for units 01-03.
195 AMX-004 Qubeley (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2015 December Redesign of HGUC-004 with better articulation and improved proportions.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
196 MS-07B Gouf (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,500 2016 April Parts variant of HGBF-015; redesign of HGUC-009 with better articulation and improved proportions. The left hand's 75mm machine gun can be swapped with a normal hand. Backpack is compatible with HGBF-015's Customized Backpack.
197 YMS-15 Gyan (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,200 2016 May Redesign of HGUC-002 with better articulation and improved proportions.
198 ZGMF-X56S/α Force Impulse Gundam (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥1,800 2016 June Redesign of HGSEED-17 with better articulation and improved proportions. Can be separated into Chest Flyer and Leg Flyer; shield transforms via parts-swapping. Includes Silhouette Flyer and non-transformable YFX-M56S Core Splendor in fighter mode and docking mode, as well as two Action Base adapters for Chest Flyer and Leg Flyer.
199 RX-0 Full Armor Unicorn Gundam (Destroy Mode/Red Color Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn RE:0096 ¥3,500 2016 June Re-release of HGUC-100 with Full Armor parts from HGUC-178. Includes Hyper Beam Javelin and additional marking sheet.
200 MSN-00100 Hyaku Shiki (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2016 August Redesign of HGUC-005 with better articulation and improved proportions. Not chrome plated unlike its predecessor. Includes marking sheet with four "百" markings.
201 ZGMF-X20A Strike Freedom Gundam (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,000 2016 November Redesign of HGSEED-34 with better articulation and improved proportions. First kit with bilingual Japanese/English text on its box packaging and instruction manual.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
202 RGM-79[G] GM Ground Type Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team ¥1,500 2017 January Redesign of HG08-02 with improved articulation and proportions. Includes rocket launcher and net gun.
203 MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam [Gunpla Evolution Project] Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2017 April Redesign of HGUC-041 with better articulation and improved proportions. Transforms via parts-swapping. Includes grenade launchers, Hyper Mega Launcher with landing gear, and Action Base 2 adapter for Wave Rider mode. Shield features missile pod as seen in the Zeta Gundam compilation films. Can accommodate HGUC-040's head to make the Zeta Zaku from episode 12 of Gundam ZZ. First release in Bandai's "Gunpla Evolution Project" to prepare for the 40th anniversary of Gunpla in 2020.[7] Reissues from 2023 onwards are molded in Ecopla, which is plastic recycled from materials discarded during the production of regular Gunpla.
204 RMS-154 Barzam Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,600 2017 May Compatible with HGUC-193/194's backpack.
205 RX-78AN-01 Gundam AN-01 "Tristan" Mobile Suit Gundam Twilight Axis ¥1,600 2017 June Uses the A plate runner of HGUC-047.
206 MS-08TX/S Efreet Schneid Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,800 2017 July
207 RX-79BD-1 Blue Destiny Unit 1 "EXAM" Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,600 2017 August Redesign of HGUC-080 with better articulation and improved proportions. Transforms to EXAM Mode with parts-swapping on backpack. Uses the C1 and C2 plate runners of HGUC-202. Includes head parts to create either the game version or the manga version.
208 RX-79BD-2 Blue Destiny Unit 2 "EXAM" Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,600 2017 December Parts and color variant of HGUC-207; redesign of HGUC-077 with better articulation and improved proportions. Transforms to EXAM Mode with parts-swapping on head and backpack. Includes shoulder armor parts to create either the standard or Nimbus Schterzen version.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
209 RX-79BD-3 Blue Destiny Unit 3 "EXAM" Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥1,600 2018 March Parts and color variant of HGUC-207; redesign of HGUC-082 with better articulation and improved proportions.
210 RX-79[G] Gundam Ground Type Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team ¥1,600 2018 April Redesign of HGUC-079 with better articulation and improved proportions. Uses the C plate runner of HGUC-079 and the C1 and C2 plate runners of HGUC-202.
211 OZ-06MS Leo Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,000 2018 May Released as part of the Gunpla Evolution Project.
212 RMS-117 Galbaldy β Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,500 2018 June
213 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Destroy Mode) (Narrative Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥2,800 2018 June Re-release of the Gundam Front Tokyo exclusive HGUC RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Destroy Mode) Ver.GFT with new tail stabilizers for Armed Armor DE units. Released as part of Bandai's "UC NexT 0100" project.
214 RX-160 Byarlant Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,600 2018 July Parts and color variant of HGUC-147.
215 AMS-123X-X Moon Gundam Mobile Suit Moon Gundam ¥3,000 2018 September Released as part of Bandai's "UC NexT 0100" project. Features the option to use green or clear eye/main camera parts. Includes clear black Action Base 5. Uses entirely polystyrene.
216 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Destroy Mode) (Narrative Ver.) [Gold Coating] Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥5,000 2018 October Gold chrome plated variant of HGUC-213.
217 MSN-06S-2 Sinanju Stein (Narrative Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥2,600 2018 October Uses the D plate runner of HGUC-116 and the F plate runner of HGUC-181. Bazooka transforms via parts-swapping.
218 RX-9/A Narrative Gundam A-Packs Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥5,500 2018 November Includes BA-2 display base and DBA-1 and DBA-2 clear stands to support the Large Beam Sabers.
219 MSK-008 Dijeh Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,900 2018 December Uses the C3 plate runner of HGUC-200 for beam rifle and clay bazooka. Includes two types of mono-eye rail unit: standard type and twin eye socket type.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
220 AMX-104 R-Jarja Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥1,900 2019 January Parts and color variant of HGBF-024.
221 FD-03 Gustav Karl (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,400 2019 February
222 RX-9/C Narrative Gundam C-Packs Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥2,300 2019 March Parts variant of HGUC-218.
223 WMS-03 Maganac Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,200 2019 April
224 ZGMF-X42S Destiny Gundam (Revive Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,200 2019 May Redesign of HGSEED-36 with better articulation and improved proportions. The side skirt armor can swivel to avoid interference with the legs. Includes Wings of Light and effect part for "Palma Fiocina" palm beam cannon.
225 ARX-014S Silver Bullet Suppressor Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥2,700 2019 June Parts and color variant of HGUC-170. Uses the D plate runner of HGUC-100 for Beam Magnum.
227 RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Unicorn Mode) (Narrative Ver.) [Gold Coating] Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥5,000 2019 August Re-release of the Gunpla Expo World Tour Japan 2016 Winter exclusive HGUC RX-0 Unicorn Gundam 03 Phenex (Unicorn Mode) Gold Coating Ver. with new tail stabilizers for Armed Armor DE units.
228 XXXG-01SR Gundam Sandrock Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2019 September Includes clear red Heat Shotel blades.
229 RX-104FF Penelope Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ¥6,800 2019 October FF (Fixed Flight) Unit can detach to reveal RX-104 Odysseus Gundam. Uses no polycaps. Includes BA2 display base, frame parts for FF Unit, optional chest vents, and swappable hip joints for both modes.
230 JDG-009X (JDG-OOX) Death Army Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥1,200 2019 November Features transformation gimmick with some parts-swapping. Released to coincide with the 25th anniversary of Mobile Fighter G Gundam.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
231 ZGMF-X19A ∞ Justice Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,200 2020 May Parts and color variant of HGBD:R-004; redesign of HGSEED-32 with better articulation and improved proportions.
232 GAT-04 Windam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥1,400 2020 May Includes Jet Striker to create GAT-04+AQM/E-A4E1 Jet Windam.
233 Me02R-F01 Messer Type-F01 Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ¥2,500 2020 July Originally planned to be released in June 2020, but was delayed due to COVID-19 outbreak.[8]
234 MS-06S Char's Zaku II Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,600 2020 July Redesign of HGUC-032 with better articulation and improved proportions. Includes optional side skirt armor parts molded in softer plastic to improve leg articulation. Compatible with most accessories for Zeon kits from HGGO line. Uses the E plate runner of HGUC-151. Released to coincide with the 40th anniversary of Gunpla.
235 NRX-055 Baund Doc Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥5,000 2020 October Includes clear Action Base 5 and display adapter. Fully transformable kit. Originally planned to be released in September 2020, but was delayed due to unspecified reason.[9]
236 XXXG-01H Gundam Heavyarms Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2020 October Uses the B1 and B2 plate runners of HGAC-228.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
237 GAT-02L2 Dagger L Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥1,200 2021 April Reuses the C plate runner of HGBF-001.
238 RX-105 Xi Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ¥6,000 2021 April Transforms to flight mode with minor parts-swapping.
239 XXXG-01D Gundam Deathscythe Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2021 May Uses the B1 plate runners of HGAC-228.
240 MSN-04II Nightingale Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack - Beltorchika's Children ¥7,000 2021 July Uses two F plate runners of HGUC-116 for the beam effect parts. Includes clear marking sheet.
241 MS-06 Zaku II Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,600 2021 December Parts and color variant of HGUC-234; redesign of HGUC-040 with better articulation and improved proportions.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
242 XXXG-01S Shenlong Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2022 September

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
243 STTS-909 Rising Freedom Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,400 2024 January First new retail kit after one year hiatus. Fully transformable kit. Includes connector part for shield and beam rifle in MA mode. Released to coincide with the release of Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom.
244 STTS-808 Immortal Justice Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,400 2024 January Fully transformable kit. Includes connector part for shield and beam rifle in MA mode. Released to coincide with the release of Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom.
245 NOG-M1A1 Black Knight Squad Shi-ve.A Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,700 2024 February
246 GFAS-X1 Destroy Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥13,000 2024 March Fully transformable kit. Includes display base, four large red effect parts for beam cannons, and 32 green beam effect parts. Released to commemorate the 20th anniversary of Gundam SEED Destiny and coincide with the release of Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom. At 39 cm in height, it is the tallest HGCE kit.
247 NOG-M4F2 Black Knight Squad Rud-ro.A (Griffin Arbalest Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,700 2024 March Parts and color variant of HGCE-245.
248 ZGMF-2025/F GELGOOG Menace (Lunamaria Hawke Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,900 2024 March Compatible with Wizard packs from HGSEED and NGSEED kits.
249 ZGMF-2027/A GYAN Strom (Agnes Giebenrath Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,900 2024 April Uses the A plate runner of HGCE-248. Compatible with Wizard packs from HGSEED and NGSEED kits.
250 ZGMF/A-262PD-P Mighty Strike Freedom Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,700 2024 May Gold color on the C plate runner molded in UV reactive plastic. Box art combines with that of HGCE-251 and HGCE-258.
251 ZGMF-X191M2 Infinite Justice Gundam TypeII Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,800 2024 June Uses the H1 and H2 plate runners of HGCE-231. Box art combines with that of HGCE-250 and HGCE-258.
252 ZGMF-1027M Duel Blitz Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,700 2024 July Redesign of HGSEED-02 with improved articulation and proportions with different Assault Shroud. Removal of Assault Shroud reveals GAT-X102 Duel Gundam. Includes clear display base to pose Gleipnir II.
253 ZGMF-103HD Lightning Buster Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,600 2024 September Reuses A plate runner from HGCE-252.
254 MS-06F Zaku II F Type Solari (RFV) Mobile Suit Gundam: Requiem for Vengeance ¥1,900 2024 October
255 RX-78(G)E Gundam EX (RFV) Mobile Suit Gundam: Requiem for Vengeance ¥1,900 2024 October
256 STTS/F-400 Murasame Kai Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,500 2024 October Transforms to Mobile Armor mode via parts-swapping.
257 NOG-M2D1/E Black Knight Squad Cal-re.A Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥3,700 2024 October Parts and color variant of HGCE-245.
258 ZGMF/A-42S2 & A-GXQ754/V2 Destiny Gundam SpecII & Zeus Silhouette Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥7,200 2024 November Color variant of HGCE-224 with Zeus Silhouette. Includes two clear Action Base 7. Box art combines with that of HGCE-250 and HGCE-251.
259 PMX-002 Bolinoak-Sammahn Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥3,200 2024 November

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
260 ZGMF-MM07 Z'Gok (SEED FREEDOM Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥3,200 2025 February Features additional internal space to encompass head and upper torso of HGCE-251. Includes optional damaged head parts and heat claws. AMGS-X18P Cavalier Aifrid is sold separately as OPS-15.
261 MRX-010 Psycho Gundam Mk-II Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥10,000 2025 March Parts and color variant of HGGBM-007. Includes damaged head, 20 reflector bits (10 open and 10 closed), two wire attachments for the forearms, 10 standard yellow beam effect parts, two large beam effect parts, clear Action Base 4, and four clear display stands. Fully transformable kit.
262 AMX-101 Galluss-J Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,500 2025 August

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
263 ZGMF-X666S Legend Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,800 2026 January Redesign of HGSEED-35 with improved articulation and proportions.
264 FD-03-00 Gustav Karl Type-00 Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ¥3,500 2026 February Uses E runner from HGUC-221.
265 RX-105 Xi Gundam (Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway The Sorcery of Nymph Circe) Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe ¥7,000 2026 April Re-release of HGUC-238 with optional parts (damaged Shield, upgraded Beam Rifle, face, adapters, hands, side skirt). Transforms to flight mode with minor parts-swapping.
266 TX-ff104 Alyzeus Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe ¥12,000 2026 April Removal of armor reveals RX-94 Mass Production Type ν Gundam. Fully transformable kit.
267 Me02R-M01 Messer Type-M01 (Gawman) Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe ¥3,400 2026 May Parts variant of HGUC-233.
268 XXXG-01SR2 Gundam Sandrock Custom EW New Mobile Report Gundam Wing: Endless Waltz ¥3,800 2026 June First kit from After Colony timeline based on Endless Waltz redesigns.
269 ZGMF-X2000 GOUF Ignited (Heine Westenfluss Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,600 2026 July Redesign of HGSEED-27 with improved articulation and proportions.
270 GT-9600 Gundam Leopard After War Gundam X ¥2,200 2026 August Released to commemorate the 30th anniversary of Gundam X.

B-Club # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes
1980 MS-15C Gyan Cannon Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam: Gihren's Greed ¥3,800 2000 Resin-cast upgrade kit for HGUC-002.
2015 High Detail Action Parts for YMS-15 Gyan Mobile Suit Gundam ¥4,800 2001 February Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-002.
2099 RMS-106CS Hizack Custom Conversion Parts Zeta Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥7,800 2001 Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-012.
2101 RGC-80 GM Cannon Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Variation ¥4,800 2001 July Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-020.
2110 RMS-099B Schuzrum Dias Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥12,800 2001 August Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-010/033.
2127 RGM-79SC GM Sniper Custom Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Variation ¥4,800 2001 October Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-020.
2147 RGM-86R GM III Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥7,800 2002 January Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-020.
2156 MSR-00100 Hyaku Shiki Kai Conversion Parts Zeta Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥4,800 2002 February Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-005.
2158 RX-77-3 Guncannon Heavy Custom Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Variation ¥6,800 2002 February Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-001.
2165 RMS-119 EWAC Zack Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥7,800 2002 March Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-012.
2174 RMS-179 GM II Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥4,800 2002 April Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-020.
2176 RX-78-2 Gundam Anime Version Parts Mobile Suit Gundam ¥4,800 2002 April Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-021.
2187 Mega Bazooka Launcher for MSN-00100 Hyaku Shiki Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥9,800 2002 June Resin-cast accessory kit for HGUC-005.
2204 RX-78GP03S “Gundam GP03S” Core Fighter Type Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory ¥5,800 2002 August Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-025.
2239 MS-15F Gyan Marine Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Gundam: Gihren's Greed ¥7,800 2003 January Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-002.
2276 Another Spirits 01: PF-78-1 Perfect Gundam Conversion Parts Plamo-Kyoshiro ¥9,800 2003 June Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-021.
2284 Flying Armor for RX-178 Gundam Mk-II Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥7,800 2003 July Resin-cast accessory kit for HGUC-030.
2287 RX-78-1 Prototype Gundam Conversion Parts Mobile Suit Variation ¥2,800 2003 July Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-021.
2302 Another Spirits 02: Musha Gundam Conversion Kit Plamo-Kyoshiro ¥13,800 2003 September Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-030.
2338 Another Spirits 03: Full Armor Gundam Conversion Kit Plamo-Kyoshiro ¥13,800 2004 March Resin-cast kit to convert HGUC-021 into PF-78-2 Perfect Gundam II or FA-78-2 Heavy Gundam.
2352 Mega Launcher for RMS-106 Hizack Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥9,800 2004 June Resin-cast accessory kit for HGUC-012.
2360 Another Spirits 04: PF-78-3 Perfect Gundam III Conversion Kit Plamo-Kyoshiro ¥12,800 2004 July Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-021.
2547 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-1: MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam[10] Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,420 2005 Resin-cast upgrade kit for HGUC-041. Includes new head, shoulder, and vent parts.
2624 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-4:EMS-10 Zudah Mobile Suit Gundam MS IGLOO 603 ¥7,480 2006 Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-065. Includes new head, torso, feet, and shield. Designed by Yuta Yagyu.
2670 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-6: MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam Upgrade Set 2 Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,420 2007 Resin-cast upgrade kit for HGUC-041. Includes new head and chest parts. Designed by Hiroyuki Komatsubara.
2766 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-8: RX-178 Gundam Mk-II Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥4,950 2007 Resin-cast upgrade kit for HGUC-030/035/053. Includes new head, arm, leg, and foot parts. Designed by Yuta Yagyu.
2827 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-12: MSN-00100 Hyaku Shiki Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥5,280 2008 Resin-cast upgrade kit for HGUC-005. Includes new head, leg, and foot parts. Designed by NAOKI.
2809 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-13: MS-14 Gelgoog (Herbert von Kuspen Custom) Backpack Mobile Suit Gundam MS IGLOO: Apocalypse 0079 ¥5,280 2008 Resin-cast add-on kit for HGUC-076. Designed by Yuta Yagyu.
2848 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-15: RX-93 ν Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥8,500 2008 Resin-cast conversion kit to restyle HGUC-086 into the original Double Fin Funnel Type design (second set of Fin Funnels not included). Includes new head, shoulders, beam rifle, and shield. Designed by NAOKI.
2850 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-16: RX-78NT-1 Gundam NT1 Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥7,480 2008 Resin-cast upgrade kit of HGUC-047. Includes new head, waist, side skirt, and leg parts. Designed by Yuta Yagyu.
2874 c.o.v.e.r. Kit-20: MS-09R Rick Dom [Stutzer]​ Advance of Zeta: The Flag of Titans ¥26,400 2009 Resin-cast conversion kit for HGUC-027. Designed by Yuta Yagyu.

N/A AMX-004 Qubeley (Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,500 2000 September Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-004.
N/A MS-07B Gouf (Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,300 2000 September Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-009.
N/A AMX-004 "Qubeley Mk-II" (Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,500 2000 September Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-011.
N/A AMX-004 Qubeley Mk-II (Ple Two Custom) (Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥2,500 2000 September Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-011.
N/A Gundam Operation V Mobile Suit Gundam ¥2,600 2001 May Boxed set containing color variants of HGUC-021, HGUC-001, and HGUC-007. Includes additional marking sheet.
N/A RX-78-2 “Gundam” Mobile Suit Gundam US$ 2001 US and UK release of HGUC-021 without the Hyper Bazooka and Core Fighter (the latter of which is no longer present on the box art). Advertised as a "Skill Level 3" model kit.
N/A RX-178 Gundam Mk-II (A.E.U.G.) Theatrical Release Extra Finish Ver. Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,000 2005 May Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-035 (without G-Defenser). Released to promote the Zeta Gundam Movie Trilogy.
N/A RMS-108 Marasai (Theatrical Release Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥2,000 2005 May Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-052. Released to promote the Zeta Gundam Movie Trilogy.
N/A MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam (Theatrical Release Extra Finish Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥3,200 2005 October Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-041. Released to promote the Zeta Gundam Movie Trilogy.
N/A AMX-004 Qubeley (Theatrical Release Extra Pearl Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥3,000 2006 March Limited edition pearl color variant of HGUC-041. Released to promote the Zeta Gundam Movie Trilogy.
N/A Triple Dom Jet Stream Attack Mobile Suit Gundam ¥4,000 2006 January Boxed set containing three units of color variant of HGUC-059. Includes "Ortega Hammer" hands, adjustable clear display base, effect parts, and additional marking sheet.
N/A Zeta Gundam Gryphios War Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥4,200 2006 March Boxed set containing color variants of HGUC-041, HGUC-005 (non-chrome plated), and HGUC-035 (without G-Defenser). Includes clear pink beam saber blades for HGUC-035 and additional marking sheet.
N/A RX-77-2 "Guncannon" (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-001 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A RX-75-4 Guntank (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-007 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A MS-07B Gouf (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥800 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-009 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A MSM-07S Z'Gok Commander Type (Char Aznable Custom) (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥700 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-019 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A RGM-79 GM (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥700 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-020 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A RX-78-2 Gundam (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-021 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A MS-06S Zaku II Commander Type (Char Aznable Custom) (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,000 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-032 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A MS-09 Dom/MS-09R Rick Dom (Gunpla DVD Catalog Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,700 2006 November Limited re-release of HGUC-059 bundled with Gunpla DVD catalog.
N/A Operation Capture of Jaburo Mobile Suit Gundam ¥3,000 2007 July Boxed set containing color variants of HGUC-019, HGUC-008, and HGUC-078. Includes additional marking sheet.
N/A RX-78-3 Gundam + MS-09RS Rick-Dom Mobile Suit Gundam (Novel) ¥2,500 2008 February Twin pack containing color variants of HGUC-021 and HGUC-059. Includes additional marking sheet.
N/A RX-93 ν Gundam Metallic Coating Ver. Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥5,000 2010 January Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-086. Released to promote the Blu-ray release of Char's Counterattack.
N/A MSN-04 Sazabi Metallic Coating Ver. Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥5,500 2010 January Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-088. Released to promote the Blu-ray release of Char's Counterattack.
N/A Gunpla Starter Set: RX-78-2 Gundam vs. MS-06F Zaku II Mobile Suit Gundam ¥2,000 2010 July Twin pack containing anime-accurate color variants of HGUC-021 and HGUC-040. Includes Gunpla How To Guide booklet for beginners.
N/A RX-78GP01Fb Gundam GP01Fb "Linkin Park Edition" Mobile Suit Gundam: Extreme Vs. ¥5,500 2010 November Limited edition color variant of HGUC-018; bundled with limited edition release of Linkin Park's album A Thousand Suns. Includes additional decal sheet. Released to commemorate the 40th anniversary of Warner Music Japan.
N/A RX-0 Unicorn Gundam (Destroy Mode) Titanium Finish Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥4,200 2011 March Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-100.
N/A MSN-06S Sinanju Titanium Finish Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥5,200 2011 March Limited edition metallic color variant of HGUC-116.
N/A Gundam & Zaku II Set (Gundam Breaker Original Color Ver.) Gundam Breaker ¥28,076 2013 October Limited edition color variants of HGUC-021 (in faded colors) and HGUC-040 (in Gundam colors); bundled with Gundam Breaker game and limited edition PSVita.
N/A RX-80PR Pale Rider [Limited Metallic Ver.] Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: Missing Link ¥14,893 2014 May Original release; bundled with limited edition of Missing Link game. Features metallic finish.
226 ZGMF-X42S-REVOLUTION Destiny Gundam (Heine Westenfluss Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥2,200 2019 July Limited edition color variant of HGCE-224.
228 XXXG-01SR Gundam Sandrock & Gundam Breaker Mobile Product Code Set Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥1,500 2019 September First press release with product code for mobile game.
N/A RX-78-2 Gundam (Tokyo 2020 Olympic Emblem) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,200 2020 June Special color variant of HGUC-191. Includes display base. Released as part of Tokyo 2020 Official Licensed Product.
N/A RX-78-2 Gundam (Tokyo 2020 Paralympic Emblem) Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,200 2020 June Special color variant of HGUC-191. Includes display base. Released as part of Tokyo 2020 Official Licensed Product.
N/A Extreme Gundam & Eclipse-F Parts (EXVS. 10th ANNIVERSARY COLOR Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Extreme Vs. Maxi Boost ON N/A 2020 July Limited edition color variant of HG-121 with Eclipse-F Parts; bundled with PS4 game Mobile Suit Gundam Extreme VS Maxi Boost ON Collector Edition.
N/A Xi Gundam VS Penelope Funnel Missile Effect Set Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ¥15,800 2021 April Special twin pack containing re-releases of HGUC-229 and HGUC-237 with effect parts.
N/A RX-78-2 Gundam Ver. [Alexandros] Mobile Suit Gundam ¥5,000 2021 May Limited edition color variant of HGUC-191; bundled with a special release of [Alexandros]'s single Senkō.
N/A MSZ-006 Zeta Gundam Ver. HIROKO MORIGUCHI Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥8,800 2022 March Limited edition color variant of HGUC-203; bundled with a special release of Hiroko Moriguchi's album Gundam Song Covers 3. Includes additional marking sheet.
N/A ZGMF-X10A Freedom Gundam [Polarized Clear] Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ¥5,454 2024 January Limited edition clear color variant of HGCE-192; bundled with a special release of Takanori Nishikawa's single FREEDOM.
N/A XXXG-01SR2 Gundam Sandrock Custom Mobile Suit Gundam Wing US$ 2025 September Special re-release of P-Bandai exclusive HGAC XXXG-01SR2 Gundam Sandrock Custom with color box cover as a regular retail kit in North America. Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of Gundam Wing.
N/A XXXG-01H2 Gundam Heavyarms Custom Mobile Suit Gundam Wing US$ 2025 September Special re-release of P-Bandai exclusive HGAC XXXG-01H2 Gundam Heavyarms Custom with color box cover as a regular retail kit in North America. Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of Gundam Wing.
N/A XXXG-01D2 Gundam Deathscythe Hell Mobile Suit Gundam Wing US$ 2025 September Special re-release of P-Bandai exclusive XXXG-01D2 Gundam Deathscythe Hell with color box cover as a regular retail kit in North America. Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of Gundam Wing.
N/A XXXG-01S2 Altron Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Wing US$ 2025 September Special re-release of P-Bandai exclusive XXXG-01S2 Altron Gundam with color box cover as a regular retail kit in North America. Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of Gundam Wing.

HGUC # Model Series Yen Price Announcement Date Notes
N/A MS-09 Dom Mobile Suit Gundam N/A 2015 July Parts and color variant of HGBF-039; redesign of HGUC-059 with better articulation and improved proportions. HGBF-09 includes plate runners labeled HGUC Dom.
N/A RX-78-2 Gundam Ver. HIROKO MORIGUCHI Mobile Suit Gundam N/A 2021 October Color variant of HGUC-191; appeared as an option in the Moriguchi Gunpla Grand Voting Campaign with photo of the prototype model.[11] Plans to release this model never went beyond this campaign.
N/A F91 Gundam F91 Ver. HIROKO MORIGUCHI Mobile Suit Gundam F91 N/A 2021 October Color variant of HGUC-167; appeared as an option in the Moriguchi Gunpla Grand Voting Campaign with photo of the prototype model.[12] Plans to release this model never went beyond this campaign.

Yen price excluding 5% tax (8% from 2014 to 2019; 10% from 2019 October onwards).

N/A Extreme Gundam (type-LEOS) Mobile Suit Gundam: Extreme Vs. ¥1,600 2012 May P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-121.
N/A MSM-04G Juaggu (Ver.MSV) Mobile Suit Variation ¥1,700 2012 May P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of HGUC-139. Includes additional marking sheet.
N/A FXA-05D G-Defenser & Flyingarmor Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2012 May P-Bandai exclusive re-release of accessories originally from HGUC-035 and HGUC-053 with additional marking sheet. For use with HGUC-193/HGUC-194. Includes adapter to fit G-Defenser into the backpack of RG-07/RG-08.
N/A RGM-96X Jesta Tristar Clear Ver. Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,600 2012 June P-Bandai exclusive clear color variant of HGUC-130. Released for the theatrical premiere of episode 5 of the OVA.
N/A MSN-001A1 Delta Plus Inner Space Clear Ver. Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,400 2012 June P-Bandai exclusive clear color variant of HGUC-115. Released for the theatrical premiere of episode 5 of the OVA.
N/A RGM-86R GM III (Desert Color Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,500 2012 July P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of HGUC-126.
N/A AMS-119C Geara Doga (Full Frontal Use) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn MSV ¥2,000 2012 July P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-092 with new "Sleeves" parts and additional weapons. Includes HGUC-091's beam machine gun. Uses the F plate runner of HGUC-102.
N/A RX-79BD-2 Blue Destiny Unit 2 Ω Color Mobile Suit Gundam Katana ¥1,500 2012 July P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-077.
N/A RGZ-95C ReZEL Type-C (GR) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,200 2012 August P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-108.
N/A RGM-79SP GM Sniper II (White Dingo Team Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story 0079: Rise From The Ashes ¥1,800 2012 September P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-146 with new head parts; uses the D plate runner of HGUC-077 and the F plate runner of HGHG-02. Includes Long Range Beam Rifle, Medium Shield, Vulcan Pod, 100 mm machine gun, M353A4 Bloodhound, two Federation soldier figurines, and extra marking sheet. Released under the sub-line High Grade U.C. Hard Graph.
N/A RMS-179 GM II (A.E.U.G. Color Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,400 2012 November P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-131.
N/A Base Jabber (Unicorn Zeon Remnants Color Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥1,000 2012 November P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-144.

Includes a newly molded optional RGM-79[G] GM Ground Type head.
N/A Long Rifle Mobile Suit Moon Gundam N/A 2018 September Gundam ACE November 2018 issue exclusive accessory kit for HGUC-215 and RG-29. Includes additional hand parts for RG-29. Re-released in March 2020 with Mobile Suit Gundam Shinyaku MS Daizenshuu U.C.0092‐0169 Hen Special Edition.

N/A RGM-86R GM III (Bosch Weller Custom) Mobile Suit Gundam F90: Fastest Formula ¥2,200 2023 July Gundam Side-F exclusive color variant of HGUC-126. Includes custom marking sheet.
N/A The Gundam Base Limited TOLRO-800 -Torohachi- Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥2,000 2023 August The Gundam Base exclusive release. Non-scale kit.
N/A RX-9/C Narrative Gundam C-Packs [Awakening Image Color] Mobile Suit Gundam Narrative ¥2,300 2023 August Events and The Gundam Base exclusive re-release of HGUC-222 with blue psychoframe.
N/A RMS-116H Hobby Hi-Zack (A.O.Z RE-BOOT Ver.) Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream ¥2,800 2023 September Gundam Side-F exclusive release.
N/A XM-XX Ghost Gundam Mobile Suit Crossbone Gundam: Ghost ¥6,300 2023 October P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of HGUC Phantom Gundam. Features matte and metallic silver parts. Transforms via parts-swapping. Includes Phantom Light effect parts and joint attachment for display with HGUC XM-X0 Crossbone Gundam X-0 Full Cloth.
N/A GF13-006NA Gundam Maxter Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥2,650 2023 November P-Bandai exclusive release. Uses the B plate runner of HGFC Gundam Rose. Includes transformable Core Lander, leg clamps for Flyer Shield, clear red Action Base 5 with support stands for armor explosion pose, and effect part for Burning Punch.
N/A Riko's Zaku (Plastic Model and RIKO Ver.) Plastic Model and RIKO: Puramo Joshi no Jinsei Kumitate ki ¥2,300 2023 December P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-241. Includes special decal sheet.
N/A RX-178 Gundam Mk-II (Titans) (21st Century Real Type Ver.) Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥1,800 2023 December The Gundam Base and P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-193. Includes a clear display base and water slide decal sheet.

N/A GAT-02L2 Dark Dagger L Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny ¥1,500 2024 April P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGCE-237. Includes Mk39 Low-Recoil Cannon.
N/A MSN-001-2 Delta Gundam II Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn MSV ¥2,500 2024 May Events and The Gundam Base exclusive re-release of Gundam Front Tokyo exclusive HGUC MSN-001-2 Delta Gundam II Ver.GFT Limited Color.
N/A RX-78GPZ01 Engage Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam U.C. ENGAGE ¥2,600 2024 May P-Bandai exclusive release. Includes G-Defenser Equipment and Long Rifle to convert RX-78GPZ01 Engage Gundam into Super Engage Gundam; also includes a clear display base.
N/A RGM-86R GM III (Axis Shock Image Color) Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥1,800 2024 June Gundam Side-F exclusive color variant of HGUC-126.

N/A STTS-909 Rising Freedom Gundam [Recirculation Color/Neon Yellow] Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,700 2024 September Events and The Gundam Base exclusive color variant of HGCE-243. This is an Ecopla kit.
N/A XXXG-01S2 Altron Gundam Mobile Suit Gundam Wing ¥2,400 2024 October P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of HGAC-242. Later re-released in North America as a regular retail kit.
N/A ZGMF-2025/F GELGOOG Menace Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥2,900 2024 October P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGCE-248 with Space Pack instead of Atmospheric Pack.
N/A GF13-011NC Dragon Gundam Mobile Fighter G Gundam ¥3,600 2024 November P-Bandai exclusive release. Uses the B plate runner of HGFC Gundam Rose. Includes transformable Core Lander, six Feilong Flags, extension parts for Dragon Claw, clear green Action Base 5, and effect parts for Feilong Flags and Shin Ryuusei Kochouken.

N/A RX-78-2 Gundam [Earth Color] Mobile Suit Gundam ¥1,400 2024 December P-Bandai exclusive color variant of HGUC-191. Released to commemorate the 45th anniversary of Gundam.
N/A RMS-106CS Hi-Zack Custom (A.O.Z RE-BOOT Ver.) Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream ¥2,800 2024 December P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of Gundam Side-F exclusive RMS-116H Hobby Hi-Zack (A.O.Z RE-BOOT Ver.).

N/A ZGMF/A-262B Strike Freedom Gundam TypeII & "Wings of Light" Effect Set Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom ¥4,200 2026 March P-Bandai exclusive parts variant of HGCE-250 with Super DRAGOON Mobile Weapon Wings from HGCE-201 instead of Proud Defender, with effect parts for Wings of Light and two Prototype Advanced Railguns.

N/A MWS-19051G-2 D Gundam Second Under the Gundam: Double-Fake ¥2,800 2026 May P-Bandai exclusive parts variant of HGUC MWS-19051G D Gundam First.
N/A F91 Gundam F91 [Afterimage Clear Ver.] Mobile Suit Gundam F91 ¥1,700 2026 June Events and The Gundam Base exclusive re-release of Gunpla Expo 2014 exclusive HGUC F91 Gundam F91 (Afterimage Image Clear Ver).

Yen price excluding 5% tax (8% from 2014 to 2019; 10% from 2019 October onwards).

Trivia[]

  • The colored square next to the Mobile Suit name on each box cover denotes the specific series that the suit came from.
Yellow: Mobile Suit Gundam, MSV, 08th MS Team, MS IGLOO, Harmony of Gundam, Blue Destiny, Battlefield Record U.C. 0081, Requiem for Vengeance
Light Green: Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket
Blue: Gundam 0083: Stardust Memory
Green: Zeta Gundam, Zeta MSV, Advance of Zeta
Orange: Gundam ZZ, Moon Gundam
Cyan: Gundam Sentinel
Red: Char's Counterattack, Gundam UC, Gundam UC MSV, Twilight Axis, Gundam NT, Hathaway
Pale Blue: Gundam F91, Crossbone Gundam
Bright Yellow: Victory Gundam
Red Orange: G Gundam
Purple: Gundam Wing, Gundam Wing G-Unit
Sky Blue: Gundam X
White: Turn A Gundam
Dark Blue: Gundam SEED, Gundam SEED Destiny
Glossy Blue: Extreme Vs.
No Square: Gundam SEED Freedom
  • The very first release of an HGUC Char's Zaku II was a recolor of the HG08 MS-06JC Zaku II kit (which was previously released as a JAF-CON exclusive set with the clear version of the RX-79[G] Gundam Ground Type) made for the U.S. market in 2001 before the new mold was released in 2002.
  • Shorter Mobile Suits, such as those from the late Universal Century and After Colony timelines are often not actually designed in 1/144 scale; instead being 1/132 scale.
  • Though Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom kits are part of the High Grade Cosmic Era sub-line, they use a different typeface for the mobile suit name and model number.
  • Mobile Suit Gundam: Requiem for Vengeance kits are not listed on the boxart as being part of the Universal Century, but do include the gold accenting reserved for Universal Century kits.
